## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` — no formatting issues
- [ ] `cargo clippy --workspace` — zero warnings
- [ ] `cargo test --workspace` — all tests pass
- [ ] New public APIs have at least one test
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (user-visible changes only)
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed (README, `docs/`, `CLAUDE.md`)
